title: Module Mixin
description: Define a module and include it into a class to share common functionality.
problemStatement:
Plug and play! Define a module `Flyable` with a method `fly` that prints `"I am flying!"`. Include this module into a class `Bird`.

**Requirement:** Use the `module` and `include` keywords.
hints: Modules are a great way to share code between unrelated classes (mixins).
expectedOutput: Bird instance can successfully call the fly method
solutionCode:
module Flyable
  def fly
    puts "I am flying!"
  end
end

class Bird
  include Flyable
end
